untranslatable_reason: Cup with Handle is a visual/geometric pattern requiring identification of specific price structure (cup formation, handle pullback, breakout point). This cannot be expressed as mathematical conditions using only the allowed point-in-time indicators. Pattern detection requires sequential bar analysis, identification of local minima/maxima forming cup shape, handle retracement depth measurement, and breakout confirmation—none of which are available as single indicators in the allowed set. Recommend using a dedicated pattern recognition library or custom pattern detector for this signal.
